Class RegistrationService

java.lang.Object
app.service.RegistrationService
public class RegistrationService extends Object
Handles course registration requests and approval workflow.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • RegistrationService

      public RegistrationService(CourseRepository courseRepository, RegistrationRepository registrationRepository, RbacService rbacService, AuditLogger auditLogger)

  • Method Details

    • createRequest

      public CourseRegistration createRequest(User actor, Student student, String courseId)
      Creates a registration request for a student and target course.
      Parameters:
      actor - the user performing the action
      student - the student for whom the request is created
      courseId - the target course id
      Returns:
      created registration request

    • approve

      public void approve(User actor, CourseRegistration registration) throws RegistrationException
      Approves a registration and performs actual enrollment if business checks pass.
      Parameters:
      actor - the approving user
      registration - the registration to approve
      Throws:
      RegistrationException - if approval or enrollment fails

    • reject

      public void reject(User actor, CourseRegistration registration, String reason)
      Rejects a registration request with a textual reason.
      Parameters:
      actor - the rejecting user
      registration - the registration to reject
      reason - rejection explanation

    • listByStatus

      public List<CourseRegistration> listByStatus(RegistrationStatus status)

    • listAll

      public List<CourseRegistration> listAll()
